channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sharks without key forward for game vs. Golden Knights
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks begin post-Christmas schedule with game against Tomas Hertl, Vegas Golden Knights
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Sarrazin to undergo surgery after head injury in crash in downhill training on 2026 Olympics slope
item.description: BORMIO, Italy (AP) — French standout Cyprien Sarrazin was in intensive care with a head injury and will undergo surgery after a crash during training for a World Cup downhill race on Friday on the slope set to be used for the 2026 Winter Olympics.
item.dc:creator: DANIELLA MATAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization’s planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Former NFL receiver DeSean Jackson hired as the football coach at Delaware State
item.description: DOVER, Del. (AP) — Former NFL receiver DeSean Jackson is taking over the football program at Delaware State. The school announced Jackson's hire Friday in the latest move by a Mid-Eastern Athletic Conference program to hire a former NFL star as its football coach.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tigers sign former Yankees second baseman Gleyber Torres to a $15 million, 1-year deal
item.description: The Detroit Tigers have signed former New York Yankees second baseman Gleyber Torres to a $15 million, one-year contract.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Father of Raiders star Malcolm Koonce has 1983 conviction tossed after DA says it was tainted
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Years before Las Vegas Raiders defensive end Malcolm Koonce was born, his father spent time in prison for an armed robbery conviction that prosecutors now say was tainted by a detective’s lies and “highly suggestive” photo identification techniques.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alex Ovechkin is on track to break Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin of the Washington Capitals is chasing the NHL career goals record of 894 held by Wayne Gretzky.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Eagles coach Sirianni says it's 'tough' for Hurts to play against Dallas with head injury
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jalen Hurts was still in the NFL's concussion protocol Friday, forcing the Philadelphia Eagles to prepare to play against Dallas without their star quarterback. “It's going to be tough for him to make it this week,” coach Nick Sirianni said Friday.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Woolen's late interception seals win as Seahawks beat struggling Bears 6-3 to boost playoff hopes
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Seattle Seahawks made just enough plays to boost their fading playoff hopes by beating the struggling Chicago Bears on Thursday night. Now, they'll be rooting for the Arizona Cardinals to beat the Los Angeles Rams this weekend.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Sirianni and Ertz cleared the air after exchanging words following Washington's win over the Eagles
item.description: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni and Commanders tight end Zach Ertz cleared the air after they exchanged words following Washington’s comeback win over Philadelphia on Sunday. Videos show Ertz gave Sirianni a high-five as they were headed in opposite directions.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Toledo, Pitt make bowl game history in extended contest that becomes instant classic
item.description: Toledo took down Pitt, 48-46, in Thursday's GameAbove Sports Bowl in Detroit that took six overtimes to complete, the most in bowl game history.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Haaland penalty failure and Fernandes red card pile on woes for City and United in Premier League
item.description: Erling Haaland’s failure from the penalty spot and Bruno Fernandes' latest red card compounded the woes of Manchester City and Manchester United on another tough day for the two Premier League giants.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON and STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL Hall of Famer calls out George Pickens amid Steelers three-game slide
item.description: NFL legend Terrell Owens called out Steelers wide receiver George Pickens for his mishaps in Pittsburgh's third straight loss, this time against the Kansas City Chiefs Christmas Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tennis legend volleys befuddled response after Imane Khelif receives votes for prestigious female award
item.description: Controversial Olympic boxing gold medalist Imane Khelif received four votes for AP Female Athlete of the Year and it left tennis great Martina Navratilova bewildered.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mahomes throws 3 TDs as Chiefs clinch AFC's top seed by breezing past the skidding Steelers 29-10
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Andy Reid donned a Santa Claus suit in a giddy Kansas City Chiefs locker room on Christmas Day, then handed his team a present it increasingly looks like it deserves: home-field advantage throughout the AFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears to host Inspire Change Game at final home game of the 2024 season
item.description: The NFL's Inspire Change initiative is hosting a game at Soldier Field to raise awareness for social justice causes, featuring players wearing "Inspire Change" gear, special edition merchandise, and in-stadium activations.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team Monday, in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Penix wins debut as Atlanta QB as Falcons return two picks for TDs, beat hapless Giants 34-7
item.description: Jessie Bates and Matthew Judon each had a pick-6 to carry Atlanta (8-7) to its second straight win after a four-game losing streak put its postseason hopes in jeopardy.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears vs. Lions: Injuries, inactives and key matchups for Sunday's game at Soldier Field
item.description: UPDATE: The Bears and Lions have announced their inactives for Sunday's game. See INJURY REPORT below. CHICAGO — The Bears are "playing out the string," as they say, eliminated from NFL playoff contention with three games still left to play this season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Rickey Henderson, MLB's all-time stolen base leader, dies at 65
item.description: Rickey Henderson, the man who changed Major League Baseball with his blazing, unbeatable speed, has died, the league confirmed. The all-time MLB leader in stolen bases and one of the games greatest leadoff hitters died in Oakland on Friday after a bout with pneumonia, TMZ reports.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Bulls face the Celtics on 3-game win streak
item.description: Boston Celtics (21-6, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (13-15, ninth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Chicago will look to keep its three-game win streak going when the Bulls take on Boston.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Caprock Hockey hangs tough with defending State Champion Durango
item.description: In their second-ever varsity home game, the Caprock Eagles once again had a tough test, this time with the defending 4A State Champion Durango Demons.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
